001package net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.element;
002
003import java.util.Objects;
004import net.kyori.adventure.text.Component;
005import net.pl3x.guithium.api.Unsafe;
006import net.pl3x.guithium.api.key.Key;
007import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
008import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
009
010/**
011 * Represents a labeled rectangle element with an optional tooltip.
012 *
013 * @param <T> Type of labeled rectangle element
014 */
015public abstract class LabeledRect<T extends LabeledRect<T>> extends Rect<LabeledRect<T>> {
016    private Component label;
017    private Component tooltip;
018
019    /**
020     * Create a new checkbox element.
021     *
022     * @param key  Unique identifier
023     * @param type Element type
024     */
025    protected LabeledRect(@NotNull Key key, @NotNull Type type) {
026        super(key, type);
027    }
028
029    /**
030     * Get the text label.
031     * <p>
032     * If null, default empty label will be used.
033     *
034     * @return Text label
035     */
036    @Nullable
037    public Component getLabel() {
038        return this.label;
039    }
040
041    /**
042     * Set the text label.
043     * <p>
044     * If null, default empty label will be used.
045     *
046     * @param label Text label to set
047     * @return This element
048     */
049    @NotNull
050    public T setLabel(@Nullable String label) {
051        return setLabel(label == null ? null : Component.translatable(label));
052    }
053
054    /**
055     * Set the text label.
056     * <p>
057     * If null, default empty label will be used.
058     *
059     * @param label Text label to set
060     * @return This element
061     */
062    @NotNull
063    public T setLabel(@Nullable Component label) {
064        this.label = label;
065        return Unsafe.cast(this);
066    }
067
068    /**
069     * Get the text for hover tooltip.
070     * <p>
071     * If null, no tooltip will be used.
072     *
073     * @return Tooltip text
074     */
075    @Nullable
076    public Component getTooltip() {
077        return this.tooltip;
078    }
079
080    /**
081     * Set the text for hover tooltip.
082     * <p>
083     * If null, no tooltip will be used.
084     *
085     * @param tooltip Tooltip text to set
086     * @return This element
087     */
088    @NotNull
089    public T setTooltip(@Nullable String tooltip) {
090        return setTooltip(tooltip == null ? null : Component.translatable(tooltip));
091    }
092
093    /**
094     * Set the text for hover tooltip.
095     * <p>
096     * If null, no tooltip will be used.
097     *
098     * @param tooltip Tooltip text to set
099     * @return This element
100     */
101    @NotNull
102    public T setTooltip(@Nullable Component tooltip) {
103        this.tooltip = tooltip;
104        return Unsafe.cast(this);
105    }
106
107    @Override
108    public boolean equals(@Nullable Object obj) {
109        if (!super.equals(obj)) {
110            return false;
111        }
112        T other = Unsafe.cast(obj);
113        return Objects.equals(getLabel(), other.getLabel())
114                && Objects.equals(getTooltip(), other.getTooltip());
115    }
116
117    @Override
118    public int hashCode() {
119        // pacifies codefactor.io
120        return super.hashCode();
121    }
122}
